description: Request payload sent on the gather:resource-requested bus channel to gather context for a resource.

correlationId.description: Client-generated correlation ID to thread the response back to the originating request

resourceId.description: Branded ResourceId of the resource to gather context for

maxResources.description: Maximum number of related resources to include

includeContent.description: Whether to include resource content in the gathered result

includeSummary.description: Whether to include resource summaries in the gathered result

excludeEntityTypes.description: Entity types to exclude from the semantic recall built into this context (caller-supplied; e.g. a chat consumer passes ['Question'] so prior questions never ground answer generation). Optional; default none.
